General.Name: Beijing SinoHytec Co. Ltd. Cl H
General.Description: Beijing SinoHytec Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research and development, production, and industrial application of hydrogen fuel cell engine systems and core components in Mainland China and internationally. The company is involved in the research and development, and manufacturing of hydrogen fuel cell systems and related technology development and technical services; provision of combined heat and power systems, PEM electrolyzers, and fuel cell reactors; technology consultation, exchange, transfer, and promotion; information technology consulting services; computer system services; and intellectual property services. It also engages in data processing services; computer hardware, software, and peripheral equipment manufacturing; automotive parts wholesale; automotive parts retail; conference and exhibition services; import and export of goods; import and export agent; technology import and export; inspection and appraisal of import and export commodities; industrial design services; automotive parts and accessories manufacturing; scientific research; and wholesale and retail activities. The company's products are for use in commercial vehicles, such as buses, logistics vehicles, and heavy trucks. It offers its products and services through direct sales to commercial vehicle manufacturers. Beijing SinoHytec Co., Ltd. was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
General.Address: Building B-6, Block C,, Beijing, China, 100192
